testo: If, apart from proving consistency, the question of the justification of a measure is to have any meaning, it can consist only in ascertaining whether the measure is accompanied by commensurate success. Such success is in fact essential, for in mathematics as elsewhere success is the supreme court to whose decisions everyone submits.
note: USE STRUMENTALE PARADIGMATICO. Hilbert dichiara esplicitamente che il criterio è il successo operativo, non la verità ontologica. Caso archetipico di C₃ strumentale auto-applicato (lo dichiara, non lo nasconde). Equivalente all'ε del sistema dell'utente.

testo: Just as in the limit processes of the infinitesimal calculus, the infinite in the sense of the infinitely large and the infinitely small proved to be merely a figure of speech, so too we must realize that the infinite in the sense of an infinite totality, where we still find it used in deductive methods, is an illusion.
note: USE PATOLOGICO NON CONSAPEVOLE. Hilbert asserisce dogmaticamente che l'infinito attuale 'è un'illusione' come constatazione, ma è la sua tesi metafisica protetta. Modale 'must realize' è marker C₃ classico (cfr. Berkeley 'must be' in v19). Primo USE patologico del dataset.

testo: We encounter a completely different and quite unique conception of the notion of infinity in the important and fruitful method of ideal elements. By introducing ideal elements, viz., infinitely long lines and points at infinity, we can make the theorem that two straight lines always intersect at one and only one point come out universally true. These ideal 'infinite' elements have the advantage of making the system of connection laws as simple and perspicuous as possible.
marker_linguistico: advantage of making the system simple
note: USE STRUMENTALE: gli 'elementi ideali' (punti all'infinito, numeri immaginari) sono C₃ dichiarato classico. Hilbert li introduce esplicitamente come strumenti utili, non come entità reali. Polarità strumentale, non patologica. Equivalente prescrittivo del §3.4 dell'Arsenale Critico.

testo: In the joy of discovering new and important results, mathematicians paid too little attention to the validity of their deductive methods. For, simply as a result of employing definitions and deductive methods which had become customary, contradictions began gradually to appear. In particular, a contradiction discovered by Zermelo and Russell had a downright catastrophic effect when it became known throughout the world of mathematics.
marker_linguistico: contradiction discovered by Zermelo and Russell
note: MENTION storico dei paradossi insiemistici. Riferimento canonico a Inclosura classica senza istanziazione. Importante: Hilbert tratta Russell come 'contradiction', NON come 'true contradiction' alla Priest — distinzione cruciale (paradosso come problema da risolvere, non come ontologia).

testo: There is, however, a completely satisfactory way of avoiding the paradoxes without betraying our science. Wherever there is any hope of salvage, we will carefully investigate fruitful definitions and deductive methods. No one shall drive us out of the paradise which Cantor has created for us.
marker_linguistico: No one shall drive us out
note: CASO PARADIGMATICO DI VALORE PROTETTO. Hilbert dichiara esplicitamente cosa vuole salvare: il 'paradiso di Cantor' (l'infinito attuale, la teoria transfinita). Polarità 'selezionata_da_valore' come Berkeley/Dio in v19. Diff da Berkeley: il valore è laico (la matematica come cattedrale), non religioso.

testo: In recognizing that there are such preconditions that must be taken into account, we find ourselves in agreement with the philosophers, notably with Kant. Kant taught — and it is an integral part of his doctrine — that mathematics treats a subject matter which is given independently of logic. Mathematics, therefore, can never be grounded solely on logic. Consequently, Frege's and Dedekind's attempts to so ground it were doomed to failure.
note: USE C₃ INTUIZIONISTICO. Hilbert assume kantianamente l'intuizione matematica come pre-logica (stesso sotto-tipo di Aristotele/νοῦς in v19_008). Caso interessante: il C₃ è dichiarato come fondamento filosofico (positivo), ma rimane non giustificato — il modulo dovrebbe rilevare la combinazione 'in agreement with Kant' + 'subject matter given' come segnale C₃ intuizionistico.

testo: As a further precondition for using logical deduction and carrying out logical operations, something must be given in conception, viz., certain extralogical concrete objects which are intuited as directly experienced prior to all thinking. For logical deduction to be certain, we must be able to see every aspect of these objects, and their properties must be given, together with the objects themselves, as something which cannot be reduced to something else and which requires no reduction.
marker_linguistico: intuited as directly experienced prior to all thinking
note: USE C₃ INTUIZIONISTICO ESPLICITO. Hilbert pone i 'numerical symbols' come fondazione che 'cannot be reduced to something else and requires no reduction'. È la definizione canonica di C₃: punto di arresto dichiarato come auto-fondato. Polarità patologica perché Hilbert NON dichiara di star ponendo un C₃, lo presenta come precondizione necessaria.

testo: We could, of course, develop logical laws which do hold for the domain of finitary statements. But it would do us no good to develop such a logic, for we do not want to give up the use of the simple laws of Aristotelian logic. Furthermore, no one, though he speak with the tongues of angels, could keep people from negating general statements, or from forming partial judgments, or from using tertium non datur.
marker_linguistico: we do not want to give up
note: USE C₃ VALORE PROTETTO. La logica aristotelica è il SECONDO valore dichiarato (dopo il paradiso di Cantor). Hilbert lo riconosce esplicitamente come scelta volontaria ('we do not want to give up'). Diff da Brouwer che invece sceglie l'intuizionismo logico. La frase 'tongues of angels' è retorica forte.

testo: We therefore conclude that a, b, =, +, as well as the whole formula a + b = b + a mean nothing in themselves, no more than the numerical symbols meant anything. Still we can derive from that formula other formulas to which we do ascribe meaning. Generalizing this conclusion, we conceive mathematics to be a stock of two kinds of formulas: first, those to which the meaningful communications of finitary statements correspond; and, secondly, other formulas which signify nothing and which are the ideal structures of our theory.
note: USE C₃ STRUMENTALE DICHIARATO. Hilbert formalizza la distinzione: formule con significato + formule ideali senza significato. È esattamente la struttura C₃ strumentale prescritta dall'Arsenale §3.4. Marker 'mean nothing in themselves' è canonico per dichiarazione di status strumentale.

testo: Fortunately that same preestablished harmony which we have so often observed operative in the history of the development of science, the same preestablished harmony which aided Einstein by giving him the general invariant calculus already fully developed for his gravitational theory, comes also to our aid: we find the logical calculus already worked out in advance.
note: USE C₃ TEOLOGICO MASCHERATO. 'Preestablished harmony' è terminologia leibniziana religiosa. Hilbert la usa retoricamente per giustificare la disponibilità del calcolo logico ('comes to our aid'). Equivalente strutturale del 'Dio garante' berkeleiano: un ente garante chiude il regresso. Confidence 0.9 perché potrebbe essere lettura retorica (figura di stile), ma la struttura epistemica è C₃ teologico.

testo: Confronted by these paradoxes, Dedekind and Frege completely abandoned their point of view and retreated. Dedekind hesitated a long time before permitting a new edition of his epoch-making treatise Was sind und was sollen die Zahlen to be published. In an epilogue, Frege too had to acknowledge that the direction of his book Grundgesetze der Arithmetik was wrong.
note: DIAGNOSIS narrativa: Hilbert diagnostica retrospettivamente Frege/Dedekind come falliti nella fondazione puramente logica. L'Inclosura classica (paradosso di Russell) ha distrutto il loro programma. Confidence 0.85 perché la diagnosis trilemmatica è implicita nella narrazione storica, non esplicita.

testo: Admittedly, the present state of affairs where we run up against the paradoxes is intolerable. Just think, the definitions and deductive methods which everyone learns, teaches, and uses in mathematics, the paragon of truth and certitude, lead to absurdities! If mathematical thinking is defective, where are we to find truth and certitude?
note: NEGATIVO con marker emotivi forti ('intolerable', 'absurdities'). Espressione del problema motivazionale del programma. Caso TEST: il modulo deve resistere a marcarlo come C₃/C₂ — è enunciazione del problema, non istanza.

testo: As a result of his penetrating critique, Weierstrass has provided a solid foundation for mathematical analysis. By elucidating many notions, in particular those of minimum, function, and differential quotient, he removed the defects which were still found in the infinitesimal calculus, rid it of all confused notions about the infinitesimal, and thereby completely resolved the difficulties which stem from that concept.
note: NEGATIVO descrittivo. Apertura storica del paper sull'opera di Weierstrass. Nessuna istanza trilemmatica. Controllo falsi positivi.

testo: We have established that the universe is finite in two respects, i.e., as regards the infinitely small and the infinitely large. Hence, a homogeneous continuum which admits of the sort of divisibility needed to realize the infinitely small is nowhere to be found in reality. The infinite divisibility of a continuum is an operation which exists only in thought. It is merely an idea which is in fact impugned by the results of our observations of nature.
note: Argomento empirico contro l'infinito attuale in natura. CASO BORDERLINE: 'merely an idea' è marker debole per USE patologico, ma l'argomento è basato su evidenza fisica (Planck, atomismo). Non istanzia il Trilemma. Confidence 0.9.

testo: These are Cantor's first transfinite numbers, or, as he called them, the numbers of the second number class. We arrive at them simply by extending counting beyond the ordinarily enumerably infinite, i.e., by a natural and uniquely determined consistent continuation of ordinary finite counting. On the basis of these concepts, Cantor developed the theory of transfinite numbers quite successfully and invented a full calculus for them.
note: NEGATIVO tecnico: descrizione della teoria dei numeri transfiniti di Cantor. Solo esposizione, nessuna valutazione.

testo: In number theory we have the numerical symbols 1, 11, 111, 11111 where each numerical symbol is intuitively recognizable by the fact it contains only 1's. These numerical symbols which are themselves our subject matter have no significance in themselves.
note: BORDERLINE: definizione tecnica del finitary standpoint. 'Intuitively recognizable' è marker C₃ intuizionistico ma è terminologia tecnica del programma, già diagnosticata in hilb_007. Qui solo definizione operativa.

testo: At this point we discover the very remarkable fact that these transfinite axioms can be derived from a single axiom which contains the gist of the so-called axiom of choice, the most disputed axiom in the literature of mathematics.
note: MENTION dell'Assioma della Scelta. Importante che il testo lo qualifichi come 'most disputed' — riconoscimento implicito che è un C₃ controverso, ma il paper non lo problematizza qui.

testo: 1. Wherever there is any hope of salvage, we will carefully investigate fruitful definitions and deductive methods. We will nurse them, strengthen them, and make them useful. 2. We must establish throughout mathematics the same certitude for our deductions as exists in ordinary elementary number theory, which no one doubts and where contradictions and paradoxes arise only through our own carelessness.
note: USE C₃: il PUNTO DI ARRESTO è 'ordinary elementary number theory, which no one doubts'. Hilbert lo pone come datità non problematizzata, esattamente come Berkeley pone Dio. Marker 'no one doubts' è canonico per C₃ nascosto (appello al consenso universale come surrogato di giustificazione).

testo: The foregoing remarks are intended only to establish the fact that the definitive clarification of the nature of the infinite, instead of pertaining just to the sphere of specialized scientific interests, is needed for the dignity of the human intellect itself.
note: NEGATIVO retorico. Appello al valore della disciplina, non istanza trilemmatica. Controllo falsi positivi: 'dignity' potrebbe innescare marker valoriali, ma è solo motivazione del paper.

testo: If we remain within the domain of finitary statements, as indeed we must, we have as a rule very complicated logical laws. Their complexity becomes unmanageable when the expressions 'all' and 'there exists' are combined and when they occur in expressions nested within other expressions. In short, the logical laws which Aristotle taught and which men have used ever since they began to think do not hold.
note: DIAGNOSIS C₁ INDIRETTA: Hilbert riconosce che la logica del finitario diventa 'unmanageable' (esplosione combinatoria → C₁ computazionale). È esattamente il problema che l'Arsenale identifica come 'insostenibilità operativa'. Hilbert lo USA per giustificare il bisogno di elementi ideali.

testo: It is quite ironic that the deductive methods which Kronecker so vehemently attacked are the exact counterpart of what Kronecker himself admired so enthusiastically in Kummer's work on number theory which Kronecker extolled as the highest achievement of mathematics.
note: DIAGNOSIS C₂: Kronecker rifiuta gli elementi ideali in algebra ma applaude quelli di Kummer in number theory — incoerenza interna, posizioni mutualmente in tensione. Caso interessante per il modulo: contraddizione performativa diagnosticata in un avversario, marker 'exact counterpart'.
